message:
feat(tui): breakpoint topology matrix contract with SearchTopology struct (1mfw3.4.1)

Codify per-breakpoint layout parameters as an explicit SearchTopology struct
with min_results, min_detail, has_split_handle, dual_pane fields. Add
footer_label() and inspector_label() methods to eliminate duplicated match
arms. Consolidate Wide/Medium/MediumNarrow render branches into a single
topology-driven path. Add 8 tests for topology contract validation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
